title: dysoxylum rugulosum
intro: Dysoxylum rugulosum, also known as the Philippine forest tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum rugulosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. Dysoxylum rugulosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create various remedies for its medicinal properties.
